text:
month 
1 = Medicaid FFS during the month 
Null/missing = (if no Medicaid enrollment for the month — or if the plan type code was missing) 

COMMENT: CCW creates this variable using the DE file. We consider the beneficiary to have FFS Medical coverage 
If the beneficiary had Medicaid or CHIP enrollment for the month, and the monthly managed care plan 
type code was not for a comprehensive managed care plan or a health insuring organization (i.e., 
where MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD_MM not in ('01' '04'). 
 ^
